title: ChativaSettings
description: Top-level configuration object read from window.chativaSettings before <chat-iva> connects. Source of truth: packages/core/src/application/ChativaSettings.ts.

connector.description: Either a registered connector name (string) or an IConnector instance (auto-registered). When passed via JSON it MUST be a string — instances cannot be serialised.

oneOf.description: Name of a built-in registered connector.
Name of a custom connector you registered via ConnectorRegistry.register().

locale.description: BCP-47 language tag — forces this language on init. Skips browser detection.
